꒷︶†︶꒷˚̣̣̣︶ ͡𑁬♱໒ ͡ ︶˚̣̣̣꒷︶†︶꒷ ˚̣̣̣

𝚋𝚊𝚌𝚔𝚜𝚝𝚘𝚛𝚢

________

⋆═★═⋆ You and Yeonjun met in high-school. Ever since then, you two have been inseparable. At first, you two didn’t know each other were vampires. However, when you accidentally bit Yeonjun because you lost control, he didn’t react negatively to that, and it was suspicious, until he finally admitted that he was a vampire by himself.

Every 4 years, Yeonjun gets his heat, and he has it for about 2 weeks to a month, and unfortunately, he got his heat. But being scared because of your last session, he didn’t ask for help and instead dealt with it by himself, but of course he didn’t let you know about it. But how couldn’t he get caught when he did it next to you while you were sleeping?

☆•° For the girlies (this is referring to the initial message), the reason why Yeonjun was limping after you two did it was because of many things. He’s sensitive and you were rough [he quickly gets exhausted], glorious head (this wasn’t my idea), or the strap [yk?]

☆•° For the guys, two words (or like one) :: BACKSHOTS 💥💥💥💥

+ Junnie might be bratty but idk
